# Vendored map libraries

- **Leaflet** 1.9.4 — https://github.com/Leaflet/Leaflet (BSD-2-Clause)
- **Leaflet.markercluster** 1.5.3 — https://github.com/Leaflet/Leaflet.markercluster (MIT)

Basemap tiles at runtime:
- CARTO Voyager (default) — https://carto.com
- OpenStreetMap (layer switcher) — https://www.openstreetmap.org/copyright

No Google Maps API key is required.
